It starts compact and expands into a creation/control strip, with a reserved AI entry point, giving users a guided drag-to-create experience. — Compact button expands inline into a creation/control strip. Far-right reserves an AI Chat entry point. Supports drag-to-create: phase created only on drop into a valid board location, action only on drop into a phase, task only on drop into an action. Valid parent/drop target is highlighted during drag; created item animates/highlights after drop.

suggested_links.statement: Embedded Google Docs/file preview — Version-level Drive/Docs links should be previewable inside the Builder using the shared popup shell, so users can reference approved docs without leaving the canvas. — Attempt to render the document via iframe/embed where supported, inside the shared sticky popup shell. If embedding fails (permissions, link format, browser restrictions), show a fallback to open externally. Rules: do not store file content, do not parse file content as product data in MVP, do not mutate Builder data from preview, Google Drive permissions remain outside the app.

suggested_links.statement: Stage + island layout contract — Different surfaces affect the Stage differently, and this must be explicit so future components do not break the canvas. — Explicit layout contract: Editor/Viewer Island reduces/pushes the stage (no overlay); sticky popup shell floats above the stage (no resize); Focus Island filters/isolates visible data (no mutation); View Helper popup floats above the stage and bridges opposite-view logic. Future components must declare which contract they follow.
